mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, reference_id, reference_type, title, content, ref_status, related_student_id, related_student_name, is_read, is_deleted, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{referenceId}, #{referenceType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{refStatus}, #{relatedStudentId}, #{relatedStudentName}, 0, 0, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE reference_type = #{referenceType} AND reference_id = #{referenceId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
